title: items
description: A DynamoDB table's item shape is arbitrary per-table (schemaless beyond its declared key attributes) and only knowable at Scan time -- this bundle, like legacy, publishes a single generic 'items' stream rather than a per-table schema. additionalProperties is intentionally true so every attribute native/dynamodb's cataloger.go flattens from the item's AttributeValue envelope passes through unfiltered (this schema is documentation/reference only for the Tier-3 native package; the real projection is Go, not engine schema-mode projection).

pk.description: Legacy's static illustrative primary-key field name; the real partition key attribute name is whatever the target table defines.
